blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,770 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
